name: Orange-Butterscotch Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, margarine, brown sugar and flour; press into bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes.
2. Combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, orange peel and vanilla, mixing on medium speed until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Pour over crust.
3. Bake at 325 degrees F for 1 hour and 5 minutes. Loosen cake from rim of pan and chill.
4. Combine brown sugar, corn syrup and margarine in saucepan; bring to boil, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. Chill until slightly thickened.
5. Spoon over cheesecake. Garnish with orange slice and fresh mint, if desired.
